programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victims trust in order to steal their lives.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Explores three murder cases in which investigators secured convictions from trace evidence, including fingerprinting, fibre analysis and DNA testing.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On October 2, 1987, a Boston police officer responding to a domestic disturbance call was fatally wounded. Local authorities launched a citywide manhunt, but were only able to find the fingerprints of the chief suspect.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In February 1988, a record store clerk was fatally shot in his van. After discovering a night deposit bag with thousands of dollars in the vehicle, police knew that robbery was not the motive, and began to investigate other possibilities.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A house fire, resulting in the death of two children, sees the parents as suspects, and an elderly lady is the victim of an attack.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Trusted family members, colleagues, friends, and lovers commit acts of betrayal ending in murder.

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Can police solve the murder of a young woman killed while celebrating her graduation from U.S. Naval training?

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: This true-crime series reveals how the deadliest crimes are solved by the only witnesses that never lie -- and where murderers have no place to hide: surveillance cameras.

programme.title: A Killers Mistake
programme.desc: When Iain and Sally Lawrence married he thought she would bring him wealth. Soon, he lost his job. Desperate for a payout, Iain vowed their divorce wouldnt be finalised.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Ann Metz lives for her family, particularly her two beautiful granddaughters; her husband Marshall despises Anns giving her time to anyone but him, and he will go to desperate measures to keep hold of her.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Rogelio Morales is a handsome Marine who sweeps Margarita Sanchez Lemus off her feet. Their whirlwind romance leads to marriage and the birth of a beautiful son. Behind Rogelios winning smile lurks a monster who will soon show his true colours.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In 1997, in quaint Anne Arundel County, Maryland, a detective inherits a stack of cold cases. As he begins to unravel each one, he uncovers a shocking and gruesome common thread.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A security guard was confronted by a masked man with a gun and 11-year-old Tye Hawkins was knocked down in a hit-and-run.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files of a Texas Ranger
programme.desc: On the eve of a dream wedding, police find a mother of three dead at home in an apparent home invasion; as alibis fray and egos collide, authorities call in Texas Ranger Jim Holland, wholl use patience and tactics to expose what really happened.

programme.title: Inside The Arrest
programme.desc: The discovery of a murdered schoolgirl leads to an international manhunt, and the dramatic arrest of her father and stepmother on an airport runway.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2013, a shopkeeper is shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives rush to catch them.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Diligence and technology help catch perpetrators who believe their crimes have been forgotten.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic anthropologists use art and science to give faces to victims long after their bodies have been reduced to bones.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Days after Beth von Steinner goes missing, her frozen body is found left in a rubbish pile behind her house. With no witnesses or suspects, only CCTV footage can reveal the truth of who killed her.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When Maurice Byrd is found shot dead in his home, security footage reveals he had many visitors before his body was discovered. Investigators must figure out which of those visitors is the killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A man returned to his Memphis home and discovered that his wife was missing. The husband began to receive ransom calls, but FBI agents noticed that one neighbour had a very good rapport with the kidnapper.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A security guard was confronted by a masked man with a gun and 11-year-old Tye Hawkins was knocked down in a hit-and-run.

programme.title: Betrayed

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police discover that the successful wife of a popular DJ has been murdered. Will the array of video cameras in the neighbourhood help bring her killer to justice?

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When a 33-year-old restaurateur is shot dead in his backyard in an exclusive South Carolina neighbourhood, CCTV cameras take detectives on the hunt for a strange woman and a mysterious vehicle seen prowling the streets.

programme.title: A Killers Mistake
programme.desc: 80-year-old Lea Adri-Soejoko was the heart and soul of her gardening club. When refugee Rahim Mohammadi joined she made him welcome, until he attacked her.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: When Jeff Silvernail returns home to find his partner, Lori, dead in a pool of blood, it appears to be a burglary gone horribly wrong. Investigators must uncover whether Jeff is a heartbroken partner or a monster who couldnt cope with rejection.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: When two bodies turn up in a car crash, investigators uncover the grizzly truth about a seemingly perfect relationship.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: A police officer in Manhattan Beach, Calif., is shot and killed during a routine traffic stop in 1993, and the only witness is a boy who is too terrified to tell police what he saw.

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: A career woman finds herself the target of an elaborate con, and a domestic abuse victim enlists the help of a hypnotherapist to bring her attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child The Killer
programme.desc: A father discovers his son committed three murders and makes the agonising choice to turn him in, a decision that destroys their relationship forever.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Tiffany grew up knowing her father was evil, but kept his secrets. When she finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover the extent of his heinous acts.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: A familys nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns; the desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Police rely on a drop of blood to determine a missing persons fate. When a woman is hit by a train a killer could be covering his tracks.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: When an innocent person is convicted of murder, discriminating DNA testing can provide proof of their innocence when appearance suggests otherwise.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When Dalene Carlson vanishes in the night, CCTV footage reveals several suspects, each with a motive. With this footage, police attempt to uncover the truth behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: Pregnant student Loretta Saunders vanishes without a trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building but there is nothing else and the race to find her is now on.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: 18 April 1993, and one of the most notorious religious leaders in the United States, David Koresh, along with 83 of his followers, has been trapped inside a Waco, Texas, compound for over 50 days, unwilling to surrender and surrounded by the police authorities. The siege is the longest modern-day standoff in American law enforcement history. In 24 hours, however, it will all be over, and Koresh and 73 others will be dead.

programme.title: Cult of Personality
programme.sub-title: Jim Jones and The Peoples Temple

programme.title: Cult of Personality

programme.title: Cult of Personality

programme.desc: David Koresh, the so-called Sinful Messiah of Waco, Texas, prepares his followers for a battle with the federal government, but he also sleeps with whomever he chooses, including preteen girls.

programme.title: Cult of Personality

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus travels the underworld to defeat the evil god Hades, who seeks to overthrow Zeus and bring hell to Earth.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.desc: Elliots way to his wedding with Giselle gets longer when Mr Weenie is kidnapped by a group of pampered pets determined to return him to his owners.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: With the evil wizard Gargamel hot on their trail, Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty embark on a journey through the Forbidden Forest to find a mysterious village.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody and Sherman
programme.desc: Mr. Peabody, the most accomplished canine in the world, and his boy, Sherman, use a time machine called the Wabac to embark on outrageous adventures. However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. Its up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.desc: A normally well-behaved teenager goes wild while his parents are out of town. In charge at his parents smart house, the 17-year-old sees the chance to make a fast buck when the prostitute, on the run from a scary pimp, appears at his door. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donnas pregnant daughter reunites with her mothers old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Luckiest Man In America
programme.desc: An ice-cream truck driver discovers a secret way to win as a contestant on the game show `Press Your Luck.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: During the 1972 Munich Olympics, an American sports broadcasting crew finds itself thrust into covering the hostage crisis involving Israeli athletes.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A rebellious teen incurs the wrath of a beloved clergyman by challenging the towns ban on loud music and dancing.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Look Whos Talking Now
programme.desc: In the third of the `Look Whos Talking comedies, two dogs enter the Umbriacco household - and take an immediate dislike to each other. When Molly loses her job, husband James is forced to take on a demanding role as private airline pilot. The children miss him, so he buys a dog to cheer them up. However, when Jamess glamorous boss asks his family to look after her poodle, sparks fly between the dogs.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Mildreds world is turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, comes back to look after her and takes her camping to find the mythological Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: Poppy, the optimistic leader of the trolls, and Branch, her polar opposite, embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world theyve ever known.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. After a lot of practise with a diction coach, Lina still sounds terrible, and Kathy, a bright young aspiring actress, is hired to record over her voice.

He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Cabo Pulmo, a tiny ocean community on the shores of Mexicos Sea of Cortez, is home to an extraordinary story of marine recovery. By the mid-1980s, this near-pristine coral reef was all but wiped out - decimated by reckless overfishing. That is, until those same fishermen abandoned their way of life and fought to save what Jacques Cousteau once called the aquarium of the world.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Agonising over a lost stork pack puppy, tussling with Manzi pups who are sorting their place in the hierarchy, and figuring out noisy-neighbour, both friend and foe. Following a search mission with Julz for the missing Kakuli pack in the Badlands.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Dodging leopards with the Manzi dogs while they treat themselves to a stolen feast. There is no such luck for the Kakuli pack on the hunt, as theyre foiled by a brave puku antelope. Jules and Simon retreat from charging elephants.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Stretching more than 700 kilometres through the wilds of Ontario, the Niagara Escarpment Biosphere Reserve begins with the mighty Niagara Falls and winds its way through deep valleys and caves.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Theres big news for one of the chimp groups, and rescued marmoset Jangles summons up the courage to join her new mate Reggie in the outside enclosure.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Vet Nic Masters uses high tech diagnostic equipment to examine health issues in some of the parks smaller primates, including capuchin Louis and patas monkey Penelope.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Palau is a tiny country with a big story. In 2009, this island nation in the middle of the western Pacific Ocean created the worlds first shark sanctuary to protect more than 100 shark species from reckless overfishing and the brutal practice of commercial shark finning. Then, in 2014, Palau once again led the way. It established the worlds largest marine sanctuary - a no-go zone for foreign commercial fisheries nearly the size of California.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Following a wild dog hunt with Julz as he catches up with the Manzi pack at a kill and watching for leopards and hyenas as the Kakuli pack takes great risks waiting for the rains to come.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: An emotional Julz says farewell to the dog packs. He discovers the Stork Colony pups hunting guinea fowl and is heartened to find the Kakuli pups feeding on an antelope carcass. The playful Manzi pack corner a tough warthog.

programme.title: Land of Primates
programme.desc: On the verdant island of Zanzibar, off the coast of Tanzania, lives a family of red colobus Monkeys. They are the last of their kind, trapped in a shrinking paradise.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: There are more species of beetle in the world than any other animal, and few play a role as important as the humble dung beetle. These tiny counterparts to Africas giant plant eaters bring balance to a system that supports life like no other.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The primate care staff move more than thirty capuchins in a day, the chimps react to a fallen tree and the guenons finally get to try out their revamped home.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Bryan has a trip to the dentist to remove a rotten molar, and Lee Butler returns to Vietnam to assess repairs needed at Monkey Worlds sister sanctuary.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Palau, a tiny island nation in the middle of the western Pacific ocean, is a land of giants. Large manta rays soar through its azure seas. Massive Second World War wrecks harbour dark secrets on the ocean floor. The archipelago is surrounded by a colossal underwater trench that reaches more than half a mile down into unseen depths. Its reef, one the largest living structures on the planet, is home to more than 1,500 species of fish.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Return to South Luangwa to see the new pups born to the mighty Manzi and the tiny-but-fearless Kakumbi packs. See yearling Snowy face a hungry hyena before a lion pride scatters Manzi mum Wekas pups and leaves her frantically searching for them.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Run into a lion-hyena showdown with Julz as he hunts for the elusive Manzi pack, who are missing four of their precious pups. Then join Henry from the Zambian Carnivore Programme on a house call to the Kakumbi den, where another pup has gone AWOL.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: From the dry plains of the interior come the most recognizable images of Australia, the monolithic red rock of Uluru, the languid, bounding Red Kangaroo. The Arid Heart of Australia is vast and iconic.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Meerkats may be small and vulnerable, but they are tenacious characters. Together, they are a force to be reckoned with. For this growing family, teamwork is not just keeping them alive, it is also helping them thrive.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Mekong
programme.desc: The final country on the Mekongs journey is the home of the rivers mighty delta. A large deposit of rich nutrients carried downstream from hundreds of kilometres makes this region, the jewel of Vietnams crown, a biological treasure trove.

programme.title: The Queens Cavalry
programme.desc: A look at the armoured regiment charges across the prairies in a training battle. Plus, a look at the ceremonial season is in full swing in London.

programme.title: Heroes of World War II
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Designed the Spitfire
programme.desc: Nigel Spivey pays tribute to R J Mitchell, who designed the Spitfire - the jewel in the crown of the RAF during the Second World War. Unfortunately, he died of cancer before seeing the impact his plane made during the conflict.

programme.title: Londons East End
programme.desc: We explore Londons East End in the years before the Second World War - a world of cobbled streets and thick fog where thousands of Londoners live in cramped, sooty lice-infected tenements.

programme.title: Fighting the Blue
programme.desc: Documentary series examining the Battle of Britain. This episode recalls the days when the battle was at its height and resources were stretched to breaking point. Although production of aircraft had increased, too many planes were being lost and skilled airmen were also in short supply. The RAF received priceless reinforcements of Polish and Czech pilots, though many Poles, including LA Martel, still feel that they have not received enough credit for helping to defend Britain.

programme.title: WWII: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: A wide variety of strategies are needed during World War II, as battles are fought in every continent in many different landscapes. The English are cut-off at Dunkirk following unstoppable Nazis tearing through Western Europe.

programme.title: The Nazis: A Warning From History
programme.desc: We reveal the extraordinary popularity of both Hitler and the Nazis, as well as the astonishing degree of voluntary support ordinary Germans gave the infamous Gestapo.

programme.title: Upstairs, Downstairs
programme.desc: Its June 1904 and Lady Marjorie is having her portrait painted by Guthrie Scone, a Scottish aristocrat turned avant-garde painter. A visit by Clemence the parlourmaid, now known by everyone as Sarah, to Scones studio nearly leads to a major scandal.

programme.title: When the Boat Comes In
programme.sub-title: Please Say Goodbye Before You Go
programme.desc: Jack pursues Billys girl - just to spite him! The wrongdoers behind the threats to the Duke and Lady Caroline are apprehended.

programme.title: Yes, Minister
programme.desc: Jim wants to see more women in higher posts, but Sir Humphrey does not agree.

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby has been busy trying to attract Miss Jones attentions. Meanwhile, Miss Jones has been busy trying to attract Philips attentions. During a chat with the boys, Rigsby is told that Philip has ten wives, and that he is seen as a God in his own country. Rigsby is somewhat sceptical and demands proof of Philips powers. Philip claims he can make something appear, and so performs a small ritual.

programme.title: You Rang M Lord?
programme.desc: Lady Lavender instructs her solicitor to give her shares of Jack Rubber Company to Ivy, while James is tortured by thoughts of Miss Poppy.

programme.title: Are You Being Served? Again!
programme.desc: After their first night in their own hotel, the former staff of Grace Brothers are settling into their new roles. However, they still need to come up with money to get the hotel running.

programme.title: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Mrs Hollingbery is forcing Alf to try and save money for their wedding. That includes no smoking and no drinking.

programme.desc: Poor old Marie - her small garden with its high walls and boring lawn is so imposing, its more of a prison yard than a pretty plot. Outside work she is equally devoted to charities and also looks after her grandchildren, so her garden has been neglected.

programme.desc: Engineering enthusiast Guy Martin and his best mate Mave decide to give their historic narrowboat a makeover. They learn about the most influential British interior designer of all, William Morris, while trying to stick up wallpaper he originally designed. They then master the fine art of narrowboat painting, and attempt their own version of the traditional decoration of castles and roses.

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Guy Martin examines the major inventions of the Industrial Revolution. programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: Martin Clunes goes on a journey around the coast of America to discover what life is like on the surrounding islands. He travels from Hawaiis islands of fire and Alaskas islands of snow, to the playgrounds of presidents off the New England coast.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The US-Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue starts her journey at the western end of the border, in the Mexican city of Tijuana, where she tries just about every sample in a Tequila showroom and is left in no doubt that the city deserves its reputation as a party town. She also discovers an unexpected invasion of migrants: American retirees who have settled south of the border to enjoy the good life and an ocean view at an affordable price. Over on the US side of the border, Sue spends a day with Mark Lamb, sheriff of Pinal County.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along The US-Mexico Border
programme.desc: Sue visits the Mexican city of Juarez, essentially one half of a super-city adjoining El Paso, Texas. Here she meets people whose lives traverse the border, including Gabriela, who is bringing up her kids alone in El Paso because her husband, Adrian, is not legal in America and is stuck in Juarez. Every weekend she takes the children to the border, so they can cross into Mexico and be with their dad. But Gabriela is not allowed to cross the border until her own immigration papers are finalised.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Revealing the extraordinary riches and wonders of the polar regions that have kept people visiting them for thousands of years. Today, their survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting-edge science. Most Arctic people live in Siberia, either in cities like Norilsk - the coldest city on earth - or out on the tundra, where tribes like the Dogan survive by herding reindeer.

programme.desc: Arkwright takes action when his corner shop is broken into and employs a large dog to guard his property. Unfortunately, the unruly creature is more successful at keeping customers at bay than frightening any burglars who may be about.

programme.desc: Marlene has become fed up with her husbands inattention and fears that their relationship is nearing its end. However, the parting gives them both time to consider their lives, pasts and futures.

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Back on the shop floor, chaos reigns when a surprise fire alarm practice throws the staff of Grace Brothers into panic, revealing fire precautions to be just a tad inadequate.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Rights of Man (Except for Howard)
programme.desc: Hobbo decides that the still-homeless Howard needs to show Pearl whos boss, but after Pearl slams the door in his face, Howard is despondent. programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Hobbo and his `team turn Howard into a tramp to show Pearl how rough hes been living and convince her to take him back. The men return to the camp with Howard to show Pearl how much hes roughing it, but Marina arrives at the same time and Hobbo and Howard bundle her into the tent.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Glenda sends a reluctant Barry off to paint a nice view, to take his mind off wanting to eat. Meanwhile, the dejected Howard wonders if Pearl still loves him. Hobbo takes pity on him. programme.desc: Sara Pascoe is joined by comedians Michael Spicer, Ken Cheng, and Alex Brooker for more offbeat takes on lectures, including one on How To Lead When You Dont Know What Youre Doing.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The paramedic crews are called to an unconscious child in a park, a seriously unwell man with blood in his colostomy bag, and a deaf woman with chest pains.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crews reassure a frightened elderly patient with a dislocated hip, treat a baby with a dangerously high temperature, attend a woman with a fast heart rate and help an alcoholic.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Sam and Tony are called to a woman suffering excruciating stomach pains, but soon find themselves dealing with a sudden seizure. Dino and Dave try to help a baby.

programme.title: Directors Short Cut
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Daves on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he collects an immaculate Citroen that was once used by the Gestapo in occupied France, Dave considers spending his own money on a hay cart, and Paul unearths a remarkably rust-free 1970s Alfa GTV.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul picks up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, Dave drools over a Ford Sierra Sapphire Cosworth, and Derek refuses a test drive in the worlds smallest production car, the 3.5 horsepower Peel P50.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek inspects a collection of old police cars that includes a Rover P6 complete with radio, sirens and V8 engine. Meanwhile, Paul tries to figure out who will buy an old 1975 Range Rover that has been converted into a fire engine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to collect a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock. Meanwhile, Dave enjoys the clean lines of a rare Renault Caravalle.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul sets out for County Durham in order to collect both a 1936 Singer Le Mans sports car and a pristine 1957 Lambretta LD 150. In the meantime, Derek gets his hands on a 1962 MGA MK2 Coupe.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek is reunited with the vehicle he took his driving test in, a 1957 Ford 100E Estate. Meanwhile, Paul heads north to collect a 50-year-old MGBGT that still smells like a new car.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A car crash victim has to be put into an induced coma at the roadside. Andy is called in to stand by as bomb disposal experts deal with a mortar dating back to the Boer War.

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: When a phone with a brutal drowning recorded on it is handed in to MHU headquarters, the pressure is on for Annika and the team to track down the murderer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics in Portsmouth attend a man with a mechanical heart valve and a dangerously fast pulse, while in Oxford, crews treat a student having an asthma attack.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, the paramedics treat a woman who was kicked by a horse and a baby with breathing problems, while in Oxford, crews attend an elderly priest with abdominal pain.

programme.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up in Louisiana
programme.desc: Katie meets Kia, who is accused of attempted murder after shooting a man while working as a security guard. She claims it was self-defence, but Katie questions if she used reasonable force.

programme.desc: For the first and last time, Amber Hagermans mother details her daughters shocking murder and shares chilling documentary footage that captures the 9-year-olds final days; Ambers legacy is an alert system that has saved over a thousand children.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his team set to work on transforming a derelict old boys club into a creative home for True Colours, a charity that provides children and young adults, whatever their abilities, with a space to express themselves.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Single mother Julie Jones became a national news story when she promised to look after her dying friends children. Overnight Julies family grew from three children to eight. Nick Knowles and the team travel to Huntingdon where, with the help of the local community, they aim to transform Julies house into a home for this supersized family. They have just ten days in which to finish the build.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team issue a call to arms and recruit friends, family and local trades to put in their best efforts to help transform the homes and lives of families across Britain.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team fight to save the leg of a much-loved golden retriever called Mikka. Lola, a French bulldog with twisted elbows, needs a doggy wheelchair and some challenging surgery.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A black Labrador called Shiraz is rushed to Fitzpatrick Referrals after being hit by a car. A cocker spaniel called Rosie has a bulging disc in her spine, while Elmer, a basset hound, needs to have some leg straightening and go on a diet.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and his team set to work on transforming a derelict old boys club into a creative home for True Colours, a charity that provides children and young adults, whatever their abilities, with a space to express themselves.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Single mother Julie Jones became a national news story when she promised to look after her dying friends children. Overnight Julies family grew from three children to eight. Nick Knowles and the team travel to Huntingdon where, with the help of the local community, they aim to transform Julies house into a home for this supersized family. They have just ten days in which to finish the build.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and The Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Naomi and Jason have known each other since they were teenagers and have had an on-off relationship over the years. Now that Naomi is pregnant, Jason says its changed their relationship and theyre committed to a stable partnership. Also featuring expectant mothers Bianca, who decided to settle down at 22, and Shannon who will miss out on university.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Dawn, who experienced a traumatic birth when her first child arrived in the last series of `One Born Every Minute, returns to have a second baby, with the memories of her difficult time in the same Leeds operating theatre still fresh in her mind. Meanwhile, Kirri, whos 29, met 30-year-old Brendan when they were both working at Butlins.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Christine handles a mysterious fall case, Adrian learns how to set a broken ankle, Alex helps a child whos been hit by a car, and Claire deals with a woman with agonising chest pain.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Claire comes face-to-face with stretched NHS resources when she tries to help a cancer patient whos bleeding heavily, and Ese grapples with a rare and challenging case of possible poisoning.

programme.title: Selena and Yolanda: The Secrets Between Them
programme.sub-title: The Woman in the Red Truck
programme.desc: Yolanda Saldivar, the killer of Tejano music superstar Selena Quintanilla Perez, speaks out about her relationship with the singer and hopes to shed new light on what led to that fateful day in 1995.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews are sent to a 70-year-old who has breathing problems and requires immediate surgery. Plus, paramedics are called to treat a seriously ill man who is showing signs of sepsis.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores the once great empire of Austria-Hungary, domain of the famous Habsburg monarchs. Starting in Budapest, he travels via Bratislava in Slovakia, to the beautiful and elegant city of Vienna where he immerses himself in pre-war decadence. From there he travels to Salzburg, before heading to the magnificent scenery of the Salzkammergut region.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: This time, Michael Portillo begins this journey in Berlin, the capital of Germany, which at the beginning of the 20th century was a powerhouse of science and technology. Led by his 1913 railway guide, he then heads west via the picturesque Harz Mountains to the industrial Ruhr Valley to learn how imperial Germany was war ready. He then travels south along the tourist trail of the castle studded Rhein.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3. The car is a thoroughbred classic that desperately needs a proper restoration, but its also an expensive purchase that risks not paying off.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made: the Montego Turbo.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Germanys initial triumphs lose momentum as the tide of the war turns in favour of the Allies. Internal opposition to the Reich culminates in an assassination plot.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The man responsible for the massacre of US soldiers in Malmedy, Joachim Peiper, becomes the hunted as Allied forces attempt to track him down.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Crystal Palace Park in Southeast London, treasures include a signed Paul McCartney cartoon, a portrait of Queen Elizabeth II made out of Lego bricks, and some valuable vintage Vivienne Westwood outfits.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from Ebrington Square in Derry/Londonderry in the west of Northern Ireland, where Lennox Cato discovers a table made from the gifts bestowed by a Chinese emperor, while a stunning amethyst pendant catches Susan Rumfitts eye.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Germanys initial triumphs lose momentum as the tide of the war turns in favour of the Allies. Internal opposition to the Reich culminates in an assassination plot.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The man responsible for the massacre of US soldiers in Malmedy, Joachim Peiper, becomes the hunted as Allied forces attempt to track him down.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Tropical rainforests cover just 3 per cent of our planet yet are home to a huge 50 per cent of the worlds species. They are the richest environments on earth but also the most competitive. Travelling through this enchanted world we uncover the amazing strategies the inhabitants adopt in order to survive. Look out for the flying frog mating orgy and the sinister bodysnatching Cordyceps fungi that eat their victims alive.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates the epic journey of a humpback whale and calf as they cross the richest seas that fringe our coasts. From tropical paradises, where the newborn calf takes his first faltering breaths, to the storm-ravaged icy polar seas, the whales great feeding grounds, seas of great contrast and surprise are revealed.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The adventures of a family run crew of heavy-haulage specialists as they race to transport the heaviest, longest and most precious locomotives around the world by road, rail and sea. Plus, footage reveals the history behind the featured locomotives.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: Its the last trip before Christmas and, with demand surging, fish prices are rising. Off the south coast of Cornwall, Ocean Pride is heading out in pursuit of pollock among the old sunken shipwrecks of the English Channel. 380 miles away on the Yorkshire coast, crabber Tydus is preparing to head out with hopes of a big pay day. The aim is to put six tons in the tank, a catch that this week could fetch well over £30,000.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2, but it remains to be seen whether there is any money to be made from this low-spec car.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel the length of Britain seeking items to fix up and flog on to make a handsome profit for their owners. In this episode, Henry gives Simon a motorcycling masterclass in Wiltshire.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how Georges mental illness changed Britain. She uncovers Royal papers and explores how the attempt on his life by a mentally ill subject changed psychiatry forever.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo uses George Bradshaws `Continental Railway Guide to explore Switzerland, whose remarkable railways helped make it a favourite with Edwardian tourists. He begins in the truly international city of Basel and travels east to visit the industrial Zurich. He then heads for the glorious Alps, before taking in the striking beauty of Lake Lucerne.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores the cities of the pre-war Low Countries before tasting the delicacies of Brussels. He then travels to the French sector of the Western Front, where from 1914 the trains carried a new cargo of artillery shells, with the Edwardian tourists of 1913 replaced by soldiers facing the horrors of the trenches. He will end his epic journey in the forest of Compiegne.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewsons advice on what to restore.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible - an iconic hot hatch - along with a wooden launch boat and catch-up on a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Interviews with Mountbatten himself, with Eisenhowers driver and with troops involved in the D-Day landings bring those gory and glorious days to life.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: Here, the hunt for the commandant of two death camps in Poland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The end of the year can be a time for gathering families together and for reflection,and in this festive special, the roadshow looks back on some of the most memorable, intriguing and moving stories to have appeared in recent years to find out: what happened next? From photo slides of young boys about to be shipped to Canada at the turn of the 20th century to the story of a pioneering female pilot in World War II - the team learn what happened after the cameras stopped rolling.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow is at Roundhay Park in Leeds, where highlights include a rare Alfred Wallis painting, an unusual Fairyland Lustre bowl and an intriguing cap made from celebrated racehorse Red Rums hair.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek dives into the lost Jowett marque, as a 1952 Javelin finds an unexpected home. Meanwhile, Paul and Dave find a Ford Escort thats been untouched for 30 years and set to work on it.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970s Bond Bug three-wheeler divides opinion among Mathewsons customers, while a retired engineer reluctantly auctions off his fathers treasured 60s Jaguar Mark 2.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Interviews with Mountbatten himself, with Eisenhowers driver and with troops involved in the D-Day landings bring those gory and glorious days to life.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: Here, the hunt for the commandant of two death camps in Poland.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a look at life deep undersea. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish and a unique overhead camera reveals the speed of common dolphins. Descending into the abyss, deep sea octopus fly with wings and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display. Time-lapse footage from 2,000m down captures eels, crabs and giant isopods eating.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Remote islands offer sanctuary for some of the planets strangest and rarest creatures. The rare pygmy three-toed sloth enjoys a peaceful existence on an idyllic Caribbean island, while nesting albatross thrive in predator free isolation. However, island life always comes at a cost. On the Galapagos Islands young marine iguana must escape an onslaught of deadly racer snakes the moment they hatch from the sand.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: Alvis; Vauxhall Cavalier; BMW CS Coupe
programme.desc: Derek acquires a collection of pre-war and post-war classics, including a Vincent Rapide, a 1928 Alvis, a Ford Pilot and an Indian Scout with sidecar.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan, described as the Rolls Royce of campervans.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: An insurance company asks Dec and the team to build a custom 1968 Ford Mustang for a car show, but only gives them 10 weeks to do it; in the middle of the build, the team heads to SEMA in Las Vegas, Nevada, and comes back to more work.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970s Bond Bug three-wheeler divides opinion among Mathewsons customers, while a retired engineer reluctantly auctions off his fathers treasured 60s Jaguar Mark 2.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: The boys take on a Citroen BX with no breaks, bad paintwork and a rodent infestation. Theyve got five days to fix it and flog it. Can they get it through its MOT?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in the Cotswolds and Somerset, where their finds include a set of milk churns and an old munitions shell.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Series following a group of trawler fishermen in Peterhead, Scotland. Prawn boat Amity is in the grip of a winter storm, 100 miles from shore, with its nets caught on the seabed. Skipper Jimmy Buchan and his crew battle to save the boat and themselves. Elsewhere, a rival prawn trawler is filling its nets. Skippered by the young and ambitious James West, Fruitful Bough is one of the most successful boats in Peterhead.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Jimmy Buchan, skipper of the prawn trawler Amity, has just hours to decide whether to run through a storm to Peterhead or try and ride it out. Fruitful Bough, another prawn boat, is also wondering what to do - face the mountainous seas and gale force winds or lose vital fishing time by taking shelter in the Shetland Islands? Away from the storm, the whitefish boat Ocean Venture isnt catching any valuable haddock.
